_comment: Typed accounting event for SWAP. Per PRD §Position Reference Shape, position_reference is OPTIONAL — SWAP has no position to reference, so the field is omitted. Category and primitive come from record_for('SWAP'). Payload field names match SwapEventPayload in almanak/framework/accounting/payload_schemas.py (validate_payload contract). pool_address is intentionally NOT in the canonical SwapEventPayload — keeping the payload aligned with the production Pydantic model is the load-bearing property; pool data lives on the ledger row's protocol context.
